text.title: BA Strategic Partnership Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals (input fields, scores, thresholds) to a conclusion that references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: Halt; do not author the artefact.

branch.question: Is BA positioning contested vs. sponsor expectations?

conclusion.verdict: Produce a lightweight stance review; one-cycle review.
Run full stance review with redline + signed charter.

example.trace: tier=strategic → contested=true → run full stance review with redline + signed charter.
